summary.text: The query is "Dermaplaning facial Katy TX". It seems like someone is looking for dermaplaning facials in Katy, Texas. Dermaplaning is a skincare treatment that exfoliates the skin by removing dead ski...

content.text:
**Dermaplaning** is a non-invasive skincare treatment that uses a sterile surgical blade to gently exfoliate the top layer of dead skin cells and remove fine vellus hair (peach fuzz), revealing smoother, brighter skin with little to no downtime. It’s often paired with facials and can be done monthly.[[1]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/dermaplaning/)

Several medspas, dermatology clinics, and skincare studios in or near **Katy, TX** (including Cinco Ranch and surrounding areas) offer dermaplaning facials or standalone treatments. Here are some of the top or frequently mentioned options based on current search results:

### Highly Rated or Specialized Providers
- **Le Chloé MedSpa** — Offers dermaplaning as part of or alongside their facials for deep exfoliation and peach fuzz removal.[[2]](https://lechloemedspa.com/facials/dermaplaning-katy-tx/)
- **Clear Dermatology** — Provides dermaplaning treatments (standalone or combined with other services); sessions are quick (under 30 minutes) and can be done monthly.[[1]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/dermaplaning/)
- **Anita’s Skin Care Clinic Katy** — Certified experts perform dermaplaning for smoother, radiant skin in women and men.[[3]](https://anitasskincareclinickaty.com/dermaplaning/)
- **MedSpa at Villagio** — Focuses on safe, effective dermaplaning to remove dead skin and fine hair.[[4]](https://medspaatvillagio.com/dermaplaning/)
- **4Ever Young Anti-Aging (Katy)** — Personalized dermaplaning treatments by certified specialists.[[5]](https://4everyoungantiaging.com/katy/injectables-facial-care/dermaplaning/)
- **4Ever Glow Salon & MedSpa** — Offers dermaplaning along with other advanced skincare like microneedling and peels.[[6]](https://4everglowmedspa.com/)
- **Katy Medi Spa** — Provides regenerative dermaplaning for improved skin texture and radiance.[[7]](https://www.katymedispa.com/service/dermaplaning-in-katy/)
- **Face to Face Spa (Cinco Ranch)** — Listed among top spots; offers medi-facials and related treatments.[[8]](https://facetofacespa.com/cinco-ranch/)

### Yelp Top-Rated Mentions (as of recent data)
Popular choices frequently appearing in “best dermaplaning” searches near Katy include:
- Age Less Skincare
- Facials by Jada
- Face to Face Spa
- Divinity Spa
- SkinSpirit – Katy
- Spavia[[9]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Dermaplaning&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX)

Other options include Clearstone Spa (Katy location), Hibiscus Aesthetics & Wellness, Katy Med Tech Spa, and Legacy Spa Katy.

**Recommendations**: 
- Check recent Yelp or Google reviews for the latest client feedback, pricing, and availability. 
- Many places offer packages combining dermaplaning with facials, chemical peels, or HydraFacials. 
- Contact providers directly for consultations, as they can assess your skin type and customize the treatment. 
- Book via their websites or platforms like Booksy for local listings.[[10]](https://booksy.com/en-us/s/dermaplaning/36661_katy)

For the most up-to-date info, search Google Maps or Yelp for “dermaplaning Katy TX” or visit the specific clinic sites linked in the results. Always choose licensed professionals for safety.
